text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm spending the last night of summer camp in the
common room, when...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Open desk, open desk...
choice_data_list: Working on a side gig again tonight?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, heya-hey, Trainer! Yeah, I mean, I'm just
doing as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The more you get done, the more these jobs pay
out!
choice_data_list: Want me to lend a hand?
Want me to lend a hand?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Nah, don't worry about it. Don't you have
your own work to do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hm. That look in your eye tells me you're going
to be extra stubborn today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right. I wanted to ask you about my races
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This'll give you something to keep your hands
busy with while we discuss stuff. Sound good?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking the seat next to her, I start carefully
applying labels to envelopes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is much more skilled with her hands. As
she neatly places sticker after sticker, the
mountain of finished envelopes on the table
grows bigger and bigger.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...So, Trainer. My new running style still needs a
lot of work, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I can tell from the way it feels after a run. At this
rate, when the race rolls around, I'll just end up
exhausting all my energy again.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Even though I know I have to hold myself back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm reminded of a comment made about Ines
Fujin's running style during her junior year—"Her
legs can't keep up with her heart."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, she's been running all this time on
pure feeling. But that does mean her passion for
running has always been extraordinarily high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe suppressing those emotions is a tougher
task for her than I'd imagined.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. In your eyes, how am I looking? What do
I need to do?
choice_data_list: Well, if you're finding it difficult to hold back...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's my phone. Be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh! Flutter, flutter...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, the envelopes! Ahh, sorry! I'll sort them
out after this call!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The neatly arranged stack of envelopes topples
as she darts by, scattering across the table.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Hello, is that you, Cassie? Is Polly with you?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: About that talk we had before—I'm not budging.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want you both to chase your dreams too. And
I'm going to do everything I can to make sure you
can do that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...No, that's not—that's not what I mean! Don't
worry, I'm going to keep running!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I know how tough it was for all of you to support
me, and I'm not going to let that support go to
waste.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I won't let you two quit. If you need extra
help, I'll make enough money to hire someone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to make it work—no matter what Mom
and Dad say!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And if you're still worried, just wait until the
Kikuka Sho! It won't be a repeat of the Derby, I
promise.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Click...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew...
